title: Contagem, MG — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Contagem is a city in MG with a population of 673,846. A major industrial city in Greater Belo Horizonte, known for its manufacturing base and the Itaú Power Plant lake area.
